query_text: Plan a 3-day trip for 2 people traveling from Green Bay to Atlanta from November 20th to November 22nd, 2024, with a budget of $1,650. Accommodations should be in a non-shared room. Include dining options featuring Mexican, Italian, French, or Mediterranean cuisine, and activities such as shopping and attending concerts or shows.

properties.description: Recently restored to its original gilded look of the 1920s, the Fox Theatre features "Mighty Mo," a classic Moller organ with over 3,600 pipes. The lavish theatre currently hosts Broadway musicals, comedy shows and dance companies throughout the year.

properties.description: The Center for Puppetry Arts is a unique cultural treasure - a magical place where children and adults are educated, enlightened and entertained. Since 1978, the Center has introduced millions of visitors to the wonder and art of puppetry and has touched the lives of many through enchanting performances, curriculum-based workshops and the hands-on Museum, as well as Distance Learning and Outreach Programs. The Jim Henson Collection This interactive exhibition follows Jim Henson’s prolific imagination chronologically, transporting visitors through environments that typifed the master puppeteer’s world. In addition to learning how Henson’s characters came to life and are still performed, visitors can view iconic puppets such as Kermit the Frog and Miss Piggy. Global Collection The Global Collection celebrates puppetry traditions in major cultures from around the world. Highlighting the history of puppetry in Asia, Africa, Europe, and the Americas.
properties.rankingString: #14 of 586 things to do in Atlanta
properties.name: Center for Puppetry Arts

properties.description: Since 1959, Lenox Square® has been the premier shopping destination for fashionistas throughout the Southeast. Located in the heart of Buckhead, Lenox Square offers an unparalleled shopping experience. An impressive two-story glass facade welcomes shoppers to several full-service restaurants including The Cheesecake Factory, North Italia and True Food Kitchen. This dramatic entrance showcases the iconic property’s street side presence, including a glass covered porte-cochere and valet amenities for easy access. The property boasts Bloomingdale's, Neiman Marcus and Macy's and features nearly 250 specialty stores like Apple, FENDI, Burberry, David Yurman, Louis Vuitton, and Zara. In addition to our front-side restaurants, you'll find dining experiences throughout our property that fit every taste. Enjoy a casual meal at California Pizza Kitchen, Cousins Maine Lobster, or even Sweetgreen. If you're looking for a quick bite, there's a wide selection of specialty food shops located on the lower level in the Lenox Square Dining Pavilion. Our staff cordially invites you to make Lenox Square a part of your next legendary shopping experience. We’re conveniently located at the intersection of Peachtree Road and Lenox Road, just across from our sister center Phipps Plaza.

properties.name: The Americano Atlanta
properties.description: Helmed by Chef Scott Conant, The Americano is an Italian-inspired steakhouse that is modern in approach and Italian in spirit. With an elevated, yet approachable menu it serves every taste, from fine steaks, such as prime and American Wagyu beef, to freshly made pasta, organic salads, Italian antipasti and Mediterranean seafoods including Italian crudi. The Americano blends a European style of highly personalized, tableside service with contemporary Italian-inspired dining to create an unmistakable, convivial experience within the heart of Buckhead. Conant’s culinary vision shares the spotlight with an inventive cocktail program that is playful and intricately devised.

properties.name: Max's Coal Oven Pizzeria
properties.description: Since 2009, Max’s Coal Oven Pizzeria has been serving authentic New York-style pizza, classic salads, pasta, Italian sandwiches, signature coal oven wings, and freshly made desserts. A unique feature of our restaurant is that we have the ONLY GENUINE COAL OVEN IN GEORGIA, allowing us to create perfectly crisp pizzas with a unique taste and texture that has been a hallmark of New York City pizzerias for over a century. At Max's, we take great pride in our pizza. We've perfected our dough, topped it with our secret recipe red sauce, mozzarella, classic meats, and fresh vegetables. Max’s offers a variety of options to suit everyone's taste, from sausage and pepperoni to peppers and onions. Whether you want to watch the big game with friends, celebrate a birthday, or have a picnic in Centennial Olympic Park on a summer afternoon, Max’s is the perfect place to dine in or pick up simple and delicious Italian classics.
properties.address: 300 Marietta St NW Marietta Street & BakerStreet, across from the Hilton Garden Inn Downtown, Atlanta, GA 30313-1632

properties.name: No Mas! Cantina
properties.description: No Mas! Cantina serves classic Mexican favorites & unique specialties, all made fresh – starting with Breakfast Daily at 8 am in our ADios Cafe – catering available, too. Located in historic Castleberry Hill near all major attractions in downtown Atlanta, just half a mile south of CNN and the Mercedes-Benz Stadium, with both an award winning 350 seat Mexican Restaurant with huge covered patio, plus Artisan Market of furniture, lighting, accessories, architectural elements, and 925.MX sterling silver jewelry, all handcrafted in Mexico.

properties.name: Nikolai's Roof
properties.description: Operating since 1976 and winner of the AAA Diamond Award for 23 consecutive years, Nikolai's Roof is located on the 30th floor of the Hilton Atlanta and offers breathtaking panoramic views of the Atlanta skyline. Chef Daniel Palaima has partnered with organic farmers, fishermen, and local game farmers to create fresh takes on traditional European-inspired cuisine.

properties.name: La Grotta Ristorante Italiano
properties.description: La Grotta has been an Atlanta tradition since 1978 and offers fine dining in an intimate atmosphere overlooking a beautiful garden in the heart of Buckhead.As one of the top restaurants in Buckhead, La Grotta has been voted the Best Italian Restaurant by Atlanta Magazine for 16 years in a row, the AAA Four Diamond Award recipient for 15 years and long time winner of the Di Rona Award.Enjoy traditional Northern Italian appetizers like the Vitello Tonnato to fresh homemade pastas like Goat Cheese Stuffed Ravioli. Other Menus items feature Grilled Veal Chop, Roasted Venison Chops and Filet Mignon with Melted Gorgonzola.Guests will also find an extensive wine list with Italian and New World wines (over 400 different labels).

properties.name: Pasta Da Pulcinella
properties.description: Pasta da Pulcinella strives to maintain a comfortable, cozy venue with cuisine that is unmatched in quality and care. This small, independent, quintessentially Italian restaurant embraces a unique clientele all looking for a place to eat, drink, relax, and, on occasion, order one more bottle of Chianti. Whether it’s a young couple or a group event, theater patrons or traveling business persons, everyone basks in the romantic charm of our little yellow house hidden in the shadow of skyscrapers.

properties.name: La Tavola Trattoria
properties.description: La Tavola is a classic, cozy Italian trattoria located in Atlanta's famous Virginia Highland neighborhood featuring exposed brick, dark wood floors, rustic colors and an open exhibition kitchen. The restaurant features an extensive wine list, classic dishes made from the finest traditional ingredients and approachable, friendly service. Perfect for family gatherings, romantic dinners or just a quick, yet satisfying, bite at the bar, here you will always feel welcomed and at home around our table.
